Around the World in 80 Days (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $24,004,159Details
International Box Office $48,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $72,004,159
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,576,132 (31.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.17 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$110,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,801 opening theaters/2,801 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $46,230,232

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 16th, 2004 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: August 26th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: November 2nd, 2004 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for action violence, some crude humor and mild language
Running Time: 120 minutes
Franchise: Around the World in 80 Days
Cast, crew, or production detail: Gratuitous Cameos, Remake
Geographical setting: China, India, London, New York City, Paris, San Francisco
Plot point: Gambling, Inventor, Romance, Travelogue
Subgenre: Chase Adventure
Time period setting: 1870s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walden Media
Production Countries: United States, Germany, Ireland, United Kingdom
Languages: English, Cantonese, French, German, Hindi, Turkish
